company: Vietnam Railways Corporation, metro companies, or PPP consortia for urban railways and high-speed rail
desc: Organize and supervise line operations, develop scheduling plans, manage safety and technical aspects, analyze operational data, and optimize system capacity.

position: Intelligent Mobility System Planning and Analysis Specialist
company: State transport management agencies, Departments of Transport, research institutes/centers, smart city operation centers
desc: Conduct research, collect and analyze traffic data; propose policies, planning, and intelligent traffic coordination solutions for urban and regional areas.

company: Airlines, airports, or multimodal transport companies
desc: Manage flight/operation schedules, coordinate aircraft fleets or passenger/cargo flows; monitor service quality, safety, and regulatory compliance.

position: Smart Mobility Product, Data, and Technology Development Specialist
company: Logistics companies, transportation technology firms, Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) startups
desc: Develop digital platforms for smart mobility; exploit journey data, optimize user experience, and improve operational efficiency.

position: Urban Transport & Smart Infrastructure Project Manager
company: Local governments, project management boards, public infrastructure units, PPP partners
desc: Organize and monitor project progress and budget for smart transport infrastructure, coordinate stakeholders, and ensure compliance with technical, environmental, and social standards.

position: Researcher or Project Assistant in Sustainable Transport Development
company: International organizations, research institutes, training institutions in transport – urban – sustainability fields
desc: Participate in research, policy implementation, and international cooperation projects on sustainable mobility, smart cities, or green transformation in transportation.
